info.name: AERO API
info.description:
AERO helicopter flight operations management API.

Session-based auth (JSESSIONID cookie). Login first, then the cookie is automatically attached to subsequent requests.

Default users:
- admin@aero.pl / admin (ADMIN)
- planista@aero.pl / planista (PLANNER)
- nadzor@aero.pl / nadzor (SUPERVISOR)
- pilot@aero.pl / pilot (PILOT)

exec: // Attach JSESSIONID cookie to every request if we have one

item.name: Test Flow (run with Collection Runner)
item.description:
Sequential test suite — run all requests top-to-bottom via Collection Runner.
Generates a unique email per run so it is repeatable without clearing the DB.

request.description: Create a new user. No auth required. Roles: ADMIN, PLANNER, SUPERVISOR, PILOT.

Authenticate and obtain a session cookie. Saves JSESSIONID for all subsequent requests.

Switch between roles using the saved examples below:
- Admin: admin@aero.pl / admin
- Planner: planista@aero.pl / planista
- Supervisor: nadzor@aero.pl / nadzor
- Pilot: pilot@aero.pl / pilot
Returns the currently authenticated user or 401.
Invalidates the session and clears the saved cookie.
Returns all helicopters sorted by status then registration number.

Creates a new helicopter. Saves returned ID to {{helicopterId}}.

Examples:
- Active: ACTIVE status with inspectionExpiryDate (required)
- Inactive: INACTIVE status, inspectionExpiryDate can be null
- Validation error: blank/invalid fields → 400
Returns all landing sites sorted by name.

Creates a landing site. Saves returned ID to {{landingSiteId}}.

Examples include real Polish airfields and a validation error case.
Returns all users. Requires ADMIN, SUPERVISOR, or PILOT role.
Creates a new user. Requires ADMIN role.
PILOT role requires pilotLicenseNumber and licenseExpiryDate.
Public. Returns all activity types.
Public. Returns PILOT, OBSERVER.
Public. Returns 7 operation statuses.
Public. Returns 7 order statuses.
Returns operations filtered by status. Add ?status=SUBMITTED to filter.
Creates a flight operation. Requires PLANNER or SUPERVISOR.
Actions: confirm (SUPERVISOR), reject (SUPERVISOR), cancel (PLANNER).
Upload and parse a KML file.
Creates a flight order. Validates crew weight, range, inspections, licenses.
Actions: sendForApproval, approve, reject, complete, partialComplete, notComplete.
